Bash(psql "postgresql://erp_dev_user:erp_dev_password@localhost:5432/erp_dev" -c "SELECT name, cnpj, uf, CASE WHEN ""certDigitalConteudo"" IS NOT NULL THEN ''SIM'' ELSE ''NAO'' END as cert FROM ""Company"" LIMIT 1;")

Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''./node_modules/@prisma/client''\); const prisma = new PrismaClient\({ datasources: { db: { url: ''postgresql://erp_dev_user:erp_dev_password@localhost:5432/erp_dev?schema=public'' } } }\); prisma.company.findFirst\({ select: { ambienteNfse: true, cnpj: true } }\).then\(c => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(c\)\); return prisma.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); return prisma.$disconnect\(\); }\);")
